title: Audit Drive fallback usage and remove obsolete Google Forms workflows
description: Copilot flagged that GasLogger.js's Drive fallback (DriveApp.getFolderById at line ~150, DriveApp.getFileById at line ~237) needs oauthScopes that aren't currently declared in script/appsscript.json. Before just adding the scope, verify whether this Drive fallback path is still a real use case for this project: PR #1 migrated RankChoiceVoting from a Google Forms-based workflow to a self-contained webapp deployment (SurveyModel.js/WebApp.js/webSurvey.js), and the Forms-era code paths may no longer need Drive access at all. Separately, any remaining Google Forms-related workflows/scripts in this repo are stale now that the webapp approach has replaced Forms as the survey front-end and should be removed.
acceptance_criteria: Done when: (1) each call site using getFolderById/getFileById is traced to confirm whether it is still reachable from the current webapp-only flow; (2) if still needed, appsscript.json's oauthScopes is updated to include the required Drive scope; if not needed, the dead code is removed instead; (3) any Google Forms-specific workflow code/docs still present in the repo are identified and removed, since the webapp deployment replaced Forms as the survey delivery mechanism.
close_reason: Deleted Forms-era files (createRCVform.js, cleanResponses.js, testRCV.js) and Forms-only wrapper functions (processRankedChoiceVotes, processCondorcetVoting); removed corresponding onOpen.js menu items. Confirmed GasLogger.js Drive usage and appsscript.json oauthScopes are unrelated (active webapp features), no changes needed there.
